name: api_nano_banana_pro_text_to_image
description: Google Gemini 3 Pro Image (a.k.a. Nano Banana Pro) via the GeminiImage2Node API node — pure text-to-image variant. No reference images; the prompt alone drives composition. Aspect ratio is parameterizable via the top-level aspect_ratio argument (defaults to 1:1 baked into the workflow). Resolution is 1K; edit the template JSON to change it. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.
